mascot_message: Hi there! I’ve updated our Community Rules. Before we carry on, please read through them and confirm that you’ve read them so we’re all on the same page! (´• ω •`)
text:
USER AGREEMENT AND PRIVACY POLICY FOR CL (Clegendary Launcher)

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS AND OPEN SOURCE
This Agreement governs the relationship between the user and the developers of CL (Clegendary Launcher). By installing the software, you agree to the terms of this Agreement.
- Age restrictions: By using the software, you confirm that you have reached the age that allows you to independently accept the terms of this Agreement according to the laws of your country, or you have the permission of a parent/guardian.
- License: CL is open-source software. The logic and code of the project are distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3). You have the right to study, modify, and distribute the code in accordance with the terms of this license.

2. TRADEMARK, DESIGN, AND API PROTECTION (TRADEMARK & ASSETS)
We use a hybrid licensing model. The code is open, but the Visual Style and Access Keys are not.
- Trade Dress: The name "CL (Clegendary Launcher)", logos, icons, background images, and unique UI elements are the property of the developers and do NOT fall under the GPLv3 license.
- Rules for forks: If you create your own version of the launcher (fork), you MUST:
  1. Change the name of the program and completely replace all graphic resources (branding) with your own.
  2. Use your own API keys (Client IDs/API Keys) for Microsoft, CurseForge, and other services. The use of keys from the original CL project in derivative products is prohibited.

3. PRIVACY, DATA COLLECTION, AND UPDATES
We respect your privacy. The launcher operates on the principle of data minimization.
- Local data: Your authorization tokens, settings, and logs are stored only on your device.
- Updates: The program may automatically send anonymous technical requests to our servers to check for updates and download them to ensure security and stability.
- Crash Reports: With your EXPLICIT CONSENT (granted in the settings window or upon the first launch), the launcher may automatically send reports about critical crashes to the developers using the Sentry service.
  1. These reports are completely anonymous. We programmatically block the collection of your IP address, Windows username, and geolocation.
  2. The report contains only: the technical error code, Windows OS version, and launcher version, which is necessary exclusively for fixing bugs.
  3. You can disable this feature at any time in the program settings.
- We DO NOT collect: Passwords, personal files, browser history, geolocation, and IP addresses.

4. THIRD-PARTY SERVICES AND CONTENT
The launcher interacts with third-party services: Microsoft (Xbox Live), Mojang Studios, CurseForge, Modrinth, LittleSkin. By using them, you agree to their terms.
- Modifications: The launcher provides only technical access to mod catalogs. We are not the authors of modifications, resource packs, or modpacks that you download, and we do not pre-moderate them.

5. DISCLAIMER
The software is provided "AS IS", without any warranties. The project is in active development.
The developers are not responsible for:
- Any damages, data loss, or hardware malfunctions.
- Incorrect operation of third-party mods, servers, or skins.
- Account bans: We are not responsible for any sanctions (bans, access restrictions) applied to your game account by server administrators or Mojang/Microsoft as a result of using this software, mods, or cheats. You use the software at your own risk.

6. NO AFFILIATION WITH MOJANG/MICROSOFT
CL (Clegendary Launcher) is an independent development and is NOT an official product of Mojang Studios or Microsoft Corporation. We encourage you to use a licensed copy of the game Minecraft.

7. CHANGES AND CONTACTS
This agreement may be updated by the developer. Continued use of the Launcher constitutes your acceptance.
Contacts (Discord): clegendary
